src: iText for .NET is the .NET version of the iText library, formerly known as iTextSharp, which it replaces. iText represents the next level of SDKs for developers that want to take advantage of the benefits PDF can bring. Equipped with a better document engine, high and low-level programming capabilities and the ability to create, edit and enha
ja: iText for .NETは、iTextSharpの後継となるiTextライブラリの.NET版です。より優れたドキュメントエンジン、高水準・低水準のプログラミング機能、PDFの作成・編集・拡張機能を備え、開発者がPDFの利点を最大限に活用できる次世代SDKです
